tests.q: Which underlooked stock ranks #1 and what stance did its research debate reach?
tests.answer_head:
## Underlooked #1 Stock and Research Debate Stance

**#1 Ranked Underlooked Stock: OPRA (Opera Limited)**

The `underlooked_top` field in the source is explicitly a ranked list. OPRA sits at position 1 with an underlooked score of **86.1** [data/stock-valuations.json].

**Research Debate Stance: RESEARCH-MORE**

The research paper for OPRA reached a stance of **"RESEARCH-MORE"** with a conviction score of **6** [data/research-papers.json]. The one-line thesis describes it as "a profitable, net-cash, Rule-of-40 compounder (score: 44) growing revenue 24% Y

tests.q: Did the backtest harness indict any live signal type, and does the meta-labeler agree?
tests.answer_head:
## Backtest Harness Indictment of Live Signal Types

### What the Harness Found

Only one live signal type had enough graded rows to produce a verdict: **`screener_top_pick`**, with 40 graded rows [data/backtest-harness.json].

The results are damning:

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Hit rate | **30.0%** |
| Avg 21-day excess vs SPY | **–10.01%** |
| Median 21-day excess vs SPY | **–11.43%** |

[data/backtest-harness.json]
